---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new diagnostic, treatment, or feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: "feature/diagnostic"
assignees: ""
---

## 🎯 Feature Description
_What feature or diagnostic should be added?_

## 🤔 Problem It Solves
_What problem does this address?_

## 📊 Philosophy Alignment
- [ ] Helps users (Helpful Neighbor)
- [ ] Educates users
- [ ] Shows value/impact
- [ ] Respects privacy

## 🔍 If it's a Diagnostic
- **Check Category:** (security/performance/seo/compatibility/etc)
- **User Persona:** (BasicSiteHealth/SmallBusiness/Corporate/etc)
- **Personas Affected:** 
- **KB Article Needed:** Yes/No
- **Training Video Needed:** Yes/No

## 🔧 If it's a Treatment
- **Related Diagnostic:** 
- **Risk Level:** (Low/Medium/High)
- **Requires Backup:** Yes/No
- **Can be Undone:** Yes/No

## 📝 Additional Context
_Any mockups, examples, or references?_
